name: io.github.denis-platonov/qtm4j
title: QTM4J
description: MCP server for QMetry Test Management for Jira (QTM4J) Open API.

environmentVariables.name: QTM4J_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the QTM4J Open API.

environmentVariables.name: QTM4J_PROJECT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default QTM4J project ID used when tool calls omit projectId.

environmentVariables.name: NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED
environmentVariables.description: Set to 0 only when you must allow self-signed TLS certificates.
